text: Statement of Purpose My passion for computers started for me as kid when I used to work with Raspberry Pis and has been shaped by both rigorous academic and diverse industry experiences across Germany as an exchange student and Jordan.

Statement of Purpose My passion for computers started for me as kid when I used to work with Raspberry Pis and has been shaped by both rigorous academic and diverse industry experiences across Germany as an exchange student and Jordan. As a student at the German Jordanian University, I've gained a strong foundation in computer engineering, complemented by hands-on projects and international exposure.

As a student at the German Jordanian University, I've gained a strong foundation in computer engineering, complemented by hands-on projects and international exposure. A key milestone in my career was a research which I have co-authored that is published in IEEE Access as a Q1 research paper and is called “A Comparative Study of Deep Learning Semantic Segmentation Models for Kidney Segmentation in Ultrasound Images Using The Open Kidney Dataset”.

A key milestone in my career was a research which I have co-authored that is published in IEEE Access as a Q1 research paper and is called “A Comparative Study of Deep Learning Semantic Segmentation Models for Kidney Segmentation in Ultrasound Images Using The Open Kidney Dataset”. This experience reinforced my desire to work at the intersection of Al and real-world impact.

This experience reinforced my desire to work at the intersection of Al and real-world impact. I recently completed an internship focused on SAP AI technologies, where I worked with SAP AI Core and contributed to the development of multi-agent conversational systems.

I recently completed an internship focused on SAP AI technologies, where I worked with SAP AI Core and contributed to the development of multi-agent conversational systems. My tasks involved applying Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and deploying large language models (LLMs) in enterprise applications.

My tasks involved applying Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and deploying large language models (LLMs) in enterprise applications. This experience not only broadened my technical expertise but also reinforced my determination to pursue a career as an AI researcher.

This experience not only broadened my technical expertise but also reinforced my determination to pursue a career as an AI researcher. I am particularly interested in advancing intelligent systems that integrate deep learning, natural language processing, and scalable software engineering.

I am particularly interested in advancing intelligent systems that integrate deep learning, natural language processing, and scalable software engineering. My earlier work in computer vision at JODDB and my leadership as IEEE club president further reflect my commitment to innovation and my ability to thrive in collaborative, research-driven environments.

My earlier work in computer vision at JODDB and my leadership as IEEE club president further reflect my commitment to innovation and my ability to thrive in collaborative, research-driven environments. I am highly motivated to apply for the DAAD Scholarship because of its strong interdisciplinary orientation and vibrant academic community.

I am highly motivated to apply for the DAAD Scholarship because of its strong interdisciplinary orientation and vibrant academic community. I am eager to contribute to ongoing research in Artificial Intelligence while also learning from distinguished faculty in the field.

I am eager to contribute to ongoing research in Artificial Intelligence while also learning from distinguished faculty in the field. The program’s focus on innovation, together with its integration of theory and practice, aligns seamlessly with my long-term ambition of pursuing a Ph.D. and advancing AI systems that address significant real-world challenges.

The program’s focus on innovation, together with its integration of theory and practice, aligns seamlessly with my long-term ambition of pursuing a Ph.D. and advancing AI systems that address significant real-world challenges. I am confident that the scholarship will help me financially to further my intellectual growth, make meaningful contributions, and prepare me for the next stage of my academic and professional journey in AI.
